question: What specific climate report did Celeste Saulo, Secretary-General of the World Meteorological Organization, present visually, and how did United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres characterize its findings?
answer: Celeste Saulo presented the 'State of the Global Climate 2023' report, which documented new records for every climate indicator. United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres characterized its findings as a 'distress call' showing 'a planet on the brink'.

video: Celeste Saulo holds up a document titled 'State of the Global Climate 2023' while being photographed.
text: The United Nations weather agency stated that 2023 set new records for every single climate indicator in its annual State of the Global Climate report.
United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres described the report as a 'distress call' showing 'a planet on the brink'.
